sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, name STRING, created_at DATE, value FLOAT);
SELECT id, md5_number_lower(name) AS hash_value, created_at + 1 AS new_date, value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, md5_number_lower(name) AS hash_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id, md5_number_lower(name)) AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT name, md5_number_lower(name) + 100 AS adjusted_hash FROM test_data WHERE created_at + 7 IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, ref_id INT, info STRING);
SELECT a.id, md5_number_lower(a.info) AS info_hash, a.ref_id FROM additional_data a JOIN test_data t ON a.ref_id = t.id WHERE t.value IS NULL OR t.value < 5;
SELECT id, md5_number_lower(name) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM additional_data) AS hash_adjusted FROM test_data WHERE (name IS NOT NULL) AND (name != '') ORDER BY hash_adjusted DESC;
SELECT id, value FROM test_data WHERE value + md5_number_lower(name) > 10.5 OR created_at IS NULL;
